beta.bar: ToMenu is currently in beta — features may change
hero.title:
Where to eat today?
Question answered.
hero.lead: ToMenu collects lunch menus from every restaurant in your city. See prices, allergens, and delivery options — all in one place. Free, no ads.
stat.restaurants.label: restaurants
stat.dishes.label: dishes daily
stat.cities.label: city (so far)
stat.price.label: free forever
dl.title: Try ToMenu for free.
dl.sub: Works on any Android phone (version 8.0 and up). Installation takes less than a minute.
dl.dev_note: 💻 For power users: ToMenu is open-source and self-hostable. You can run your own backend and API on your own server. Source code is available on GitHub.
how.title: Three steps. No account needed.
how.sub: No account, no credit card, nothing extra to install. Download the APK and you're ready.
step1.title: Download the app
step1.desc: Click the button above to download the APK file. Android may ask for permission to install from unknown sources — this is normal for apps outside the Play Store.
step2.title: Open and browse
step2.desc: The app automatically finds restaurants in your city and sorts them by distance. Filter by price, allergens, or search for a specific dish across all venues.
step3.title: Choose and go
step3.desc: One tap opens the address in Maps or calls the restaurant directly. Done — no extra steps.
feat.title: Everything for picking lunch. Nothing extra.
feat.sub: We're obsessed with getting you to your food as fast as possible — no unnecessary clicks or sign-ups.
feat.gps.title: GPS sorting
feat.gps.desc: Restaurants are automatically sorted by distance from you. Closest always on top.
feat.search.title: Dish search
feat.search.desc: Type "chicken schnitzel" and see it across all restaurants at once — with price and weight.
feat.filter.title: Filters & allergens
feat.filter.desc: Filter by price, weight, 14 EU allergens, or delivery availability. Even by price-to-portion ratio.
feat.delivery.title: Food delivery
feat.delivery.desc: See immediately which restaurants offer delivery — before you even open their menu.
feat.week.title: Full week
feat.week.desc: Don't plan just for today. Check Monday's menu on Wednesday and plan your lunch ahead.
feat.notif.title: Lunch reminders
feat.notif.desc: Set a time and the app will notify you every day when menus are ready. Never forget lunch.
fyp.title: The app suggests food just for you.
fyp.sub: The new "For You" feature works like a personal food assistant. Swipe dishes — like or dislike — and the app gradually learns what you enjoy.
fyp.swipe.title: Swipe dishes
fyp.swipe.desc: Swipe right if a dish interests you, left if it doesn't. It doesn't get simpler than that.
fyp.learn.title: The app learns
fyp.learn.desc: The more you swipe, the better your recommendations get. No accounts or settings required.
fyp.open.title: One tap to the menu
fyp.open.desc: Like a dish? You're instantly taken to the restaurant page with that dish highlighted.
fyp.preview.label: For you today
cities.title: Where does ToMenu work?
cities.sub: Currently covering Levice, Slovakia. More cities are being added — if you'd like your city included, get in touch.
priv.title: Your data is yours. Full stop.
priv.sub: We don't make you the product. ToMenu is an app, not an ad platform.
priv.1: No ads — ever. Not in the app, not on the website.
priv.2: No account required. Guest mode works from the first launch.
priv.3: Data sharing is always opt-in and clearly labelled.
priv.4: Delete your account and all data — anytime, instantly, directly in the app.
priv.5: Source code is public (open-source, MIT license). Anyone can verify what the app does.
api.title: There's a REST API too.
api.sub: All menu data is available via a clean JSON API. Build Telegram bots, office tools, integrations — whatever you want. Keys are free during beta.
